title: use start_date instead of reference_date

body: This PR adds a function to load the ERA5 initial conditions files from an artifact if no `era5_initial_condition_dir` is provided in the config. This allows the user to use their own IC files, or load them automatically.
title: Use initial conditions artifact for weather quest

Use ClimaLand v0.6.5. This should fix the ClimaDiagnostics downstream test that's currently failing in https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaDiagnostics.jl/pull/164
